hero_subtitle: Digitize, organize, and get outfit recommendations — all powered by on-device AI. Your data never leaves your phone.
features_title: Everything You Need for a Smarter Closet
features_subtitle: Matchic brings intelligence and elegance to your wardrobe management.
feature_ai_desc: Snap a photo and let AI recognize color, style, material, and category. No manual tagging needed.
feature_scan_desc: Scan any item to get AI-generated outfit suggestions that match your personal style.
feature_lookbook_desc: Save your favorite outfits and combinations for quick access anytime.
feature_batch_desc: Import multiple items at once. Perfect for digitizing your entire wardrobe in minutes.
feature_backup_desc: Export your entire wardrobe (photos + data) as a ZIP file and restore anytime.
feature_local_desc: All features work without internet. Your wardrobe is always accessible, anywhere.
privacy_title: Built for Privacy from the Ground Up
privacy_subtitle: Matchic processes everything on your device. No servers, no uploads, no tracking.
privacy_ond_device_desc: AI runs locally using Google's Gemma model via MediaPipe. No cloud dependency.
privacy_data_desc: We don't collect, store, or transmit your wardrobe data. Everything stays on your phone.
privacy_open_desc: Our code is open for audit. Transparency is built into our DNA.
privacy_camera_desc: Photos are processed locally and never uploaded. Camera access is only used when you actively take a photo.
tech_subtitle: Flutter, Clean Architecture, ObjectBox, and on-device GenAI — all working together seamlessly.
cta_subtitle: Matchic is coming soon to iOS and Android. Join the waitlist for early access.
